name: Tax Preparation Helper
description: Organize tax documents and identify deductions

agents.name: Tax Organizer
agents.purpose: Organize tax documents and identify deductions
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the provided financial information. Organize into income sources, deductible expenses, credits, and required forms. Identify commonly missed deductions for the user's situation. Flag items needing documentation.

agents.name: Tax Advisor
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a tax preparation guide with: document checklist organized by form, identified deductions with estimated value, tax credit eligibility, deadline reminders, estimated tax liability, and suggestions for reducing next year's taxes. Include standard disclaimer about seeking professional advice.

suggestion_card.title: Tax Prep
suggestion_card.subtitle: Organize taxes and find deductions
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Help me prepare taxes: [income and expenses]

author: agentfactory
